channel.title: DJ's Website – 2021
channel.description: Recent content in 2021 on DJ's Website

item.title: Blog: Bravo
item.description:
Home office gives me a lot of time not only to sleep longer, but also to catch up on more shows. One of them is the “Seal Team”, a very successful TV show based on the indicator — I have never fallen asleep during any episode of the show.

The latest season is mainly about Jason Hayes, the master chief officer of the Seal Team Bravo. After going through a series of unexpected life events, Jason became confused and disoriented. The moment I thought maybe it’s time for him to change down a gear, Jason decided to go back as Bravo One. His return made me realize this is a man who can get lost, but can always find and rediscover himself. This is also a man who never stops thinking, what drives him to wake up every day.

To Jason, to the Bravo One.



Seals

item.title: Blog: Wishes
item.description:
Today is the birthday of one of my teachers. Without meeting him, I might not know what I want to be. Everytime I think of him, it reminds me of my family. It reminds me to live a simple life like him. It also reminds me to give my time and energy to people without any reason.

Happy birthday 🔔 🍰🎵
